messages.subject: [R--gR] drawing phylogenies in R
messages.body_plain:
Dear gR-list:

The paper below might be interesting for people working on displaying 
graphs in R.  (I have not tried anything out.)

  Pedigree-drawing with R and graphviz
 	Jing Hua Zhao
 	Bioinformatics 2006 22: 1013-1014.
http://bioinformatics.oxfordjournals.org/cgi/content/abstract/22/8/1013?etoc

--Mathias
